title: ExtraEnderchest
description: A plugin that adds the Large Enderchest (one block double inventory size) with customizable crafting recepie and extensive config
body:
# ExtraEnderchest Unlock a larger, personal Ender Chest with a custom crafting recipe — fully configurable and editable in-game. --- ## Features - Large Enderchest item with enchantment glint and custom name/lore - Per-player persistent storage (1 to 6 rows, configurable) - Unique crafting recipe (editable any time via in-game GUI or recipe.yml) - Fully configurable messages, sounds, inventory size, and permissions ## Crafting Recipe (default) ![Crafting recepie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcd4e186b40d44ebc6bf3255ce13c23e61a88cf9_0.webp) ## Credits

This project is managed by WolfyLaboratory. [More Info ↵](https://wolfylabs.notion.site/Managed-Projects-3629c98ee1558005a45fe485c1c30d63?pvs=74) ``` Developer · Barni ``` © wolfylabs
